_showWeekNumbers.desc: Sets a value whether the week's numbers are displayed.

_showDayNames.desc: Sets a value whether the day names are displayed. By default, the day names are displayed.

_enableWeekend.desc: Sets a value indicating whether weekend persists its view state.

_enableOtherMonthDays.desc: Sets a value indicating whether the other month days are enabled.

_showOtherMonthDays.desc: Sets a value whether the other month days are displayed.

_readOnly.desc: Sets the calendar in read only state.

_showFooter.desc: Sets a value indicating whether the calendar's footer is displayed.

_todayString.desc: Sets the 'Today' string displayed when the 'showFooter' property is true.

_clearString.desc: Sets the 'Clear' string displayed when the 'showFooter' property is true.

_enableFastNavigation.desc: Sets a value indicating whether the fast navigation is enabled.

_enableHover.desc: Sets a value indicating whether the hover state is enabled. The hover state is activated when the mouse cursor is over a calendar cell. The hover state is automatically disabled when the calendar is displayed in touch devices.

_enableAutoNavigation.desc: Sets a value indicating whether the auto navigation is enabled. When this property is true, click on other month date will automatically navigate to the previous or next month.

_enableTooltips.desc: Sets a value indicating whether the tool tips are enabled.

_stepMonths.desc: Represents the calendar's navigation step when the left or right navigation button is clicked.

_firstDayOfWeek.desc: Sets which day to display in the first day column. By default the calendar displays 'Sunday' as first day.

_columnHeaderHeight.desc: Sets the Calendar colomn header's height. In the column header are displayed the calendar day names.

_titleHeight.desc: Sets the title height where the navigation arrows are displayed.

_dayNameFormat.desc: Sets the name format of days of the week.

_titleFormat.desc: Sets the title format for the title section. Example: MMMM yyyy

_culture.desc: Sets the jqxCalendar's culture. The culture settings are contained within a file with the language code appended to the name, e.g. jquery.glob.de-DE.js for German. To set the culture, you need to include the jquery.glob.de-DE.js and set the culture property to the culture's name, e.g. 'de-DE'.

_backText.desc: Sets the tooltip text displayed when the mouse cursor is over the back navigation button.

_forwardText.desc: Sets the tooltip text displayed when the mouse cursor is over the forward navigation button.
